productDisplayName: Nike Men Casual Black Track Pant
description: Composition Black track pants made of 100% cotton, has a broad elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inseam, two insert pockets on the sides, one patch pocket at the back with a press buttoned closure and brand swoosh below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron inside out; Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these track pants from nike make for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from soft cotton, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair it with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
